text.title: nosql-redis-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for nosql-redis-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Writing cache keys with no TTL using SET instead of SETEX.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Under memory pressure Redis silently evicts data. If the eviction policy is noeviction, writes fail. Key leaks are invisible until the OOM event.
